title: rhodiola rosea var. microphylla
intro: Rhodiola rosea var. microphylla, also known as small-leafed rhodiola or miniature rhodiola, is a subspecies of the Rhodiola rosea plant, a perennial flowering plant native to the mountainous regions of the world. This plant is prized for its medicinal properties, which include adaptogenic and anti-inflammatory compounds. The health benefits of Rhodiola rosea var. microphylla include reducing stress and anxiety, improving mental performance and memory, and enhancing mood and overall well-being. Rhodiola rosea var. microphylla can be prepared as an herbal supplement, tea, or tincture, and is often used in traditional medicine to support mental and physical health.
